text:
調査はこんなところか。
しかし、思った以上の数だな……
さすがに少々くたびれたよ。

データも集まったことだし
これ以上の長居は無用だ。
戻るとしよう。

That about does it for the investigation.
However, their numbers were higher than I
expected. That was exhausting.

I have all the data I need, so it's not
necessary to remain here any longer. Let us
make our way back.
